questions.hindi: प्रिय मित्र, मुझे आशा है तुम ठीक होगे।
questions.english: Dear friend, I hope you are well.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Dear friend, I hope you are well."

questions.hindi: मैं तुम्हें अपनी नई नौकरी के बारे में बताना चाहता हूँ।
questions.english: I want to tell you about my new job.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I want to tell you about my new job."

questions.hindi: आदरणीय महोदय, मैं आपको यह पत्र शिकायत के लिए लिख रहा हूँ।
questions.english: Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint."

questions.hindi: सड़क की हालत बहुत खराब है।
questions.english: The condition of the road is very bad.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The condition of the road is very bad."

questions.hindi: कृपया इस समस्या का समाधान करें।
questions.english: Please solve this problem.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please solve this problem."

questions.hindi: प्रिय माँ, मैं यहाँ ठीक हूँ।
questions.english: Dear mother, I am fine here.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Dear mother, I am fine here."

questions.hindi: मुझे तुम्हारी बहुत याद आती है।
questions.english: I miss you a lot.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I miss you a lot."

questions.hindi: आपका स्नेही पुत्र।
questions.english: Your loving son.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Your loving son."

questions.hindi: आदरणीय संपादक महोदय, मैं यह पत्र प्रकाशित करने का अनुरोध करता हूँ।
questions.english: Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter."

questions.hindi: यह समस्या पूरे शहर को प्रभावित कर रही है।
questions.english: This problem is affecting the whole city.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This problem is affecting the whole city."

questions.hindi: प्रिय बहन, तुम्हारी शादी की बधाई।
questions.english: Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding."

questions.hindi: मैं शादी में जरूर आऊँगा।
questions.english: I will definitely come to the wedding.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will definitely come to the wedding."

questions.hindi: आदरणीय प्रबंधक महोदय, मैं अपने ऑर्डर के बारे में लिख रहा हूँ।
questions.english: Respected Manager, I am writing about my order.

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Respected Manager, I am writing about my order."

questions.hindi: मुझे गलत उत्पाद मिला है।
questions.english: I received the wrong product.

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I received the wrong product."

questions.hindi: कृपया इसे जल्द से जल्द बदलें।
questions.english: Please replace it as soon as possible.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please replace it as soon as possible."

questions.hindi: भवदीय, राहुल शर्मा।
questions.english: Yours faithfully, Rahul Sharma.

questions.hindi: प्रिय दोस्त, तुम्हारा पत्र मिला।
questions.english: Dear friend, I received your letter.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + opening line + body (news/complaint/request) + closing signature
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Dear friend, I received your letter."

questions.hindi: मैं जल्द ही तुमसे मिलने आऊँगा।
questions.english: I will come to meet you soon.

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will come to meet you soon."

questions.english: This letter is formal.
